scholarship_details: Full tuition waiver + CAD 1500/month living stipend + travel grant up to CAD 2000
requirements: Minimum GPA 3.0/4.0; letter of motivation; academic transcript; 2 recommendation letters
notes: One of Canada's top research universities. Strong programs in engineering and life sciences. Application through your home institution's international office.
housing_support: Yes — guaranteed on-campus housing available for exchange students

requirements: GPA equivalent to 5.0/6.0 Swiss scale; research proposal for graduate applicants; strong academic references
notes: Consistently ranked among the world's top 10 universities for engineering and technology. Limited slots — highly competitive.
housing_support: Housing assistance provided but not guaranteed
visa_support: Yes — detailed visa guidance for non-EU students
interview_required: Yes — online interview for graduate applicants

scholarship_details: Erasmus+ grant (if eligible) approx. EUR 700/month; KU Leuven scholarship EUR 400/month for non-Erasmus
requirements: GPA 3.0/4.0 or equivalent; language proficiency; nomination by home institution
notes: Belgium's largest and most comprehensive university. Strong humanities and sciences. Located in charming historic city 30 min from Brussels.
housing_support: Housing list provided; early application recommended

scholarship_details: SGD 500/month living allowance; no tuition fees charged
requirements: GPA 3.2/4.0 or equivalent; motivation statement; academic transcripts
notes: Asia's top university with exceptional research infrastructure. Gateway to Southeast Asia. Very competitive — secure nomination early.
housing_support: On-campus housing available at competitive rates

scholarship_details: Melbourne Research Scholarship covers tuition only; living costs covered only for PhD students
requirements: GPA 75%+ (Australian equivalent); statement of purpose; academic referee reports
notes: Australia's #2 ranked university. Excellent quality of life in Melbourne. Strong arts business and sciences. Cosmopolitan diverse campus.

scholarship_details: Full tuition + GBP 1800/month living stipend + one return flight
requirements: First-class or 2:1 equivalent degree; research background preferred; two academic references; personal statement
notes: World-class STEM university in central London. Exceptional industry connections. Note: London is expensive — budget planning essential.
housing_support: Housing guarantee for first year only
visa_support: Yes — UK visa guidance and immigration compliance support

eligible_programs: Natural Sciences; Engineering; Mathematics; Computer Science
scholarship_details: EUR 900/month Campus France scholarship; possible Eiffel Excellence top-up
requirements: Master's or equivalent; research project; B2 French OR English proficiency for English-taught tracks
english_test: DELF B2 (French tracks) or IELTS 6.5 (English tracks)
notes: France's leading research cluster with 300+ laboratories. Part of Paris-Saclay plateau near Orsay. Strong in physics mathematics and computing.

scholarship_details: No institutional scholarship; CAPES/FAPESP grants available for Brazilian-partner institutions
requirements: B2 Portuguese proficiency; GPA 3.0; motivation letter; acceptance from receiving department
notes: Brazil's largest university and Latin America's top institution. Vibrant campus in São Paulo. Cost of living is low by international standards.
housing_support: No guaranteed housing; list of residences provided
visa_support: Yes — VITEM IV visa guidance available

eligible_programs: Humanities; Social Sciences; Law; Health Sciences; Engineering
scholarship_details: UCT International Scholarship covers 50% tuition; no living stipend
requirements: GPA equivalent to UCT second class upper (65%+); personal statement; ID documentation
notes: Africa's leading research university set against Table Mountain. Unique interdisciplinary programs. Gateway to sub-Saharan Africa research networks.
visa_support: Yes — South African study permit guidance

scholarship_details: MEXT scholarship (full tuition + JPY 143000/month) for nominated students
requirements: For English programs: IELTS 6.5; strong academic record; supervisor agreement required before application
english_test: IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL iBT 79 for English track
notes: Japan's premier technology institution. English-medium graduate programs available. MEXT scholarship is among the world's most generous. Contact potential supervisor before applying.
visa_support: Yes — Embassy/Consulate MEXT visa track supported
interview_required: Yes — Skype interview with receiving faculty

scholarship_details: Erasmus+ applicable; Polimi scholarship EUR 300/month for non-EU
requirements: GPA 27/30 or equivalent; portfolio required for Design and Architecture
english_test: IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80 for English-taught programs
notes: Italy's top technical university. World-renowned Design and Architecture schools. Milan is a design and fashion capital — excellent cultural experience.

scholarship_details: DAAD scholarship for eligible applicants; TUM stipend EUR 500/month
requirements: GPA 3.3/4.0 or equivalent; German B1 (German-taught) or English B2
english_test: TestDaF or DSH for German programs; IELTS 6.0 for English
notes: Germany's top technical university. Free tuition for exchange students. Munich offers outstanding quality of life. Strong industry ties with BMW Siemens and MAN.

scholarship_details: No institutional scholarship; NZ government scholarships may apply
notes: New Zealand's #1 university in a stunning Pacific city. Excellent natural environment research programs. Friendly and safe campus environment.

scholarship_details: Korean Government Scholarship (KGSP): full tuition + KRW 1100000/month + language training
requirements: KGSP eligibility; academic achievement; motivation; TOPIK II for Korean programs
english_test: TOPIK II Level 4+ for Korean programs; IELTS 5.5 for English programs
notes: Korea's most prestigious university. KGSP scholarship is extremely generous including Korean language training. Seoul is a vibrant affordable and safe city.
housing_support: Campus dormitory guaranteed for KGSP scholars
visa_support: Yes — D-2 student visa full support
interview_required: Yes — NIA online interview for KGSP

scholarship_details: McGill Exchange bursary CAD 1000 one-time; no recurring stipend
notes: Bilingual world-class university in the heart of cosmopolitan Montreal. Low cost of living by North American standards. Outstanding research environment.
housing_support: Residence available for exchange students on request
